'''D6-L5''', sometimes known as '''Deesix''', was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] which served [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It traveled with her to [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]] on the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] when she went to address the [[Agamar Resistance]], hoping to convince them to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="FP" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The image used to portray D6-L5 in ''[[The Farlander Papers]]'' is a photo of [[C-3PO]] from {{Film|IV}}.
